skip_reason: Instagram post pages render their content (and the time[datetime] elements this bookmarklet scans for) via client-side JS that typically requires a logged-in session; in headless CI without authentication, Instagram shows a login wall and no time[datetime] elements are present.
notes: Passive - V9 page modifier. Finds all time[datetime] elements on the current page (post/story/comment timestamps) and appends an inline '.insta-ts-v9' box showing ISO+local absolute date/time with 🚨 flag if within 7 days. After stamping, adds a '.myosint-v9-badge' attribution badge fixed at bottom-right. Alerts 'No timestamp elements found on this page.' if none found.

checks.text_contains: Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training
